node.html:
• EDA Tool Flows: Developed complex Make, Tcl, and Python scripts to automate synthesis and implementation flows for Vivado and Quartus.
  • CI/CD for Hardware: Integrated Jenkins with Docker to create automated build and testing pipelines for RTL modules.
  • Python Wrappers: Built Python-based wrappers for EDA tools to simplify developer sanity checks and regression testing.
  • Linux Environment: Proficient in Shell scripting and managing hardware-software interactions in Linux/Termux environments.
  • Version Control: Expert in using Git for collaborative hardware development and RTL IP management.

• HDL Mastery: Proficient in Verilog and SystemVerilog for creating robust, synthesizable digital logic from scratch.
  • PPA Optimization: Deep knowledge of design trade-offs related to Power, Performance, and Area (PPA), ensuring high-efficiency silicon solutions.
  • Timing & CDC: Expert in Static Timing Analysis (STA), constraint development, and handling Clock Domain Crossing (CDC) issues in complex multi-clock designs.
  • Synthesis: Experienced with High-Level Synthesis (HLS) for rapid prototyping and RTL synthesis for target FPGA/ASIC flows.
  • Quality Checks: Skilled in code linting and structural quality checks to ensure silicon reliability.

• Architecture Design: Familiar with ARM-based SoC architectures, including CPU/Memory subsystems and complex bus fabrics.
  • Bus Protocols: Hands-on experience with industry-standard protocols such as AXI4, APB, and AHB.
  • Peripheral Integration: Skilled in integrating and configuring high-speed IPs like DDR4 Controllers, DMA, and custom bus bridges.
  • Board Bring-up: Knowledge of the full system lifecycle from boot processes and memory maps to physical board bring-up and verification.
  • High-Speed I/O: Experience with SerDes and Ethernet IP integration for O-RAN and Massive MIMO applications.

• Simulation Tools: Expert user of QuestaSim, Vivado, and Intel Quartus Prime Pro for hardware simulation and debugging.
  • Modern Verification: Skilled in unit testing using Cocotb (Python-based verification) for functional correctness.
  • FPGA Validation: Experienced in flashing and validating designs on Intel Agilex (F-series, I-series) and Xilinx Zynq RF SoC platforms.
  • Debug Architectures: Designed custom Ethernet-based debug architectures for real-time hardware monitoring.
  • Signal Processing Hardware: Knowledge of fixed-point implementations and hardware acceleration for PHY-layer baseband modules.
